design_philosophy: Sporty, dynamic, and high-performance. Inspired by European engineering and high-end automotive aesthetics. Uses Porsche Racing Yellow (#FFCC00) as an aggressive accent against stark white and deepest obsidian. Focus on large typography, cinematic imagery, and asymmetrical bento grids.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing combined with technical precision. Use Mode A: 'Tetris' Bento Grid for the models gallery. High contrast asymmetry.

navigation.behavior: Sticky top, Z-50. Minimal links, clear primary CTA in Porsche Yellow.

hero.layout: Full viewport height (min-h-screen). Parallax background image.
hero.content: Massive typography overlay, left-aligned, text shadow for contrast. Subtitle and primary CTA. Dark overlay max bg-black/40.

history_section.visuals: Vintage 1963 photo. Large year numbers (e.g. '1963') as watermarks or massive display text.
history_section.content: Norwegian text detailing the legacy from 1963 to today.

models_gallery.layout: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8).
models_gallery.items: Cards with solid surface backgrounds, 1px border. On hover: slight lift, subtle shadow, border turns primary yellow. Specs shown inside.

contact_section.layout: Split layout: Contact info (large text) on left, Form on right.
contact_section.form: Shadcn UI based inputs heavily customized. 1px black border inputs, square corners. Submit button in pure #FFCC00 with black text.

hero_image.description: Dynamic yellow Porsche 911 GT3 RS speeding on a scenic Norwegian fjord mountain road at golden hour.

history_1963.description: Vintage Porsche on display, representing 1963 history.

model_dakar.description: Action photography of a Porsche 911 Dakar drifting in sand.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp transitions. Interactive elements must elevate slightly (-translate-y-1) and cast a structured shadow (not blurred glow).
motion_and_interactions.scroll_animations: Use Framer Motion to stagger grid items appearing. Lenis smooth scrolling is mandatory for premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: ALL text MUST be in Norwegian as requested.
Implement Lenis smooth scrolling for premium automotive feel.
Do NOT use center-alignment for everything. Use strong left-alignment to create architectural tension.
Use Phosphor icons (duotone weight) to break the corporate tech look.
For the models gallery, utilize the 'Tetris' grid layout with mixed aspect ratios for dynamic presentation.
Do not round corners excessively. Maximum rounded-md or pure square (rounded-none) to maintain the 'performance/technical' aesthetic.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are added to all CTAs, navigation links, and the contact form submit button.
For the Hero image, use bg-black/40 overlay to ensure the bright yellow CTA button and white typography pops perfectly.
